text:
4218 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: ۝ وَ طَعٰامُ اَلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا اَلْكِتٰابَ حِلٌّ لَكُمْ ۝
قَالَ "يَعْنِي اَلْحُبُوبَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4218 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), was asked about the saying of Allah (swt), the Almighty and Majestic:
"And the food of those who were given the Scripture is lawful for you" (Surah Al-Ma'idah, 5:5).
Imam (as) said: "It means grains."
